suites.title: Home screen loads with branding and tagline
steps: Wait for home screen to load with API data

suites.title: Featured properties section loads from API
steps: Wait for home screen to load with API data
assertions: 'Biens en vedette' section header is visible

suites.title: Agency showcase section loads from API
Search bar is visible on home screen
steps: Wait for home screen to load
assertions: Search field with hint 'Rechercher un bien...' is visible

suites.title: Quick action cards are visible
steps: Scroll down to quick actions section
assertions: Apartment and location icons are visible

suites.title: Property list screen loads showing only active properties
steps: Tap the 'Biens' tab in bottom navigation
Wait for property list to load
assertions: Search field with hint 'Rechercher...' is visible
Only active properties are displayed (no archived)

suites.title: Filter bar with search and type/sale/rent chips is visible
Property cards display with price and location info
assertions: Location icons are visible on cards
Chevron right icons indicate tappable cards

suites.title: Tapping a property navigates to detail screen
assertions: Detail screen AppBar shows property ID in 'BI-X' format

suites.title: Agency list screen loads via bottom nav
steps: Tap the 'Agences' tab in bottom navigation
Wait for agency list to load
assertions: Search field with hint 'Rechercher une agence...' is visible

suites.title: Search bar is visible on agency list
assertions: Search field with hint text is visible

suites.title: Agency cards display with name and contact info
assertions: Chevron right icons indicate tappable cards

suites.title: Tapping an agency navigates to detail screen
assertions: 'Contact' section header is visible on detail screen

suites.title: Login screen renders branding, form fields, and action links
steps: Launch app and navigate to Connexion tab
Verify Horoazhon branding text and subtitle are visible
Verify two TextFormField widgets exist (email, password)
Verify 'Se connecter' button, 'Mot de passe oublié ?' link, and 'Activer un compte' link are present
assertions: Text 'Connectez-vous à votre compte' is displayed
TextButton with text 'Mot de passe oublié ?' exists
TextButton with text 'Activer un compte' exists

suites.title: Valid ADMIN_AGENCY login navigates to admin dashboard
steps: Wait for API response and navigation
assertions: Admin shell loads with 'Tableau de bord' in bottom navigation
Role chip shows 'Admin' in the app bar

suites.title: Valid CLIENT login navigates to client dashboard
steps: Wait for API response and navigation
assertions: Public shell remains with 'Profil' tab visible

suites.title: Invalid credentials displays error message
Empty fields trigger form validation errors
steps: Tap 'Se connecter' without filling any fields
assertions: Validation error 'Veuillez saisir votre email' is displayed
Validation error 'Veuillez saisir votre mot de passe' is displayed

suites.title: Password visibility toggle switches icon
steps: Verify visibility_off_outlined icon is now displayed

suites.title: Logout from admin drawer shows confirmation dialog
steps: Tap 'Plus' tab to open admin drawer
assertions: Dialog text 'Voulez-vous vous déconnecter ?' is displayed

suites.title: Confirming logout returns to login screen
steps: Tap the 'Déconnexion' ElevatedButton in the confirmation dialog
assertions: Public shell loads with 'Connexion' tab visible (user is logged out)

suites.title: Cancelling logout stays on current screen
assertions: Admin shell remains with 'Tableau de bord' tab still visible

suites.title: Activation screen loads from login link with token field
assertions: At least one TextFormField is visible (token field)
Check icon button for token verification is present

suites.title: Invalid token shows error message
steps: Navigate to activation screen from login
Tap the check icon to verify the token
assertions: Error text containing 'invalide ou expiré' is displayed

suites.title: Activation screen has correct structure and labels
steps: Navigate to activation screen from login
assertions: Token label text containing 'Token' is present
At least one TextFormField is found

suites.title: Forgot password screen loads from login link
assertions: AppBar title 'Mot de passe oublié' is displayed

suites.title: Forgot password screen has send button and back link
steps: Navigate to forgot password screen from login
assertions: ElevatedButton with text 'Envoyer le lien' is present
TextButton with text 'Retour à la connexion' is present

suites.title: Empty email shows validation error on forgot password
steps: Tap 'Envoyer le lien' without entering email

suites.title: Back link from forgot password returns to login
assertions: Subtitle 'Connectez-vous à votre compte' is visible

suites.title: Forgot password screen shows descriptive text and email icon
assertions: Instructional text 'Saisissez votre email pour recevoir un lien de réinitialisation' is displayed

suites.title: Person list loads from drawer navigation with search bar and cards
steps: Tap 'Plus' in bottom nav to open drawer
assertions: Search bar with hint 'Rechercher une personne...' is visible
At least one Card widget is displayed

suites.title: Person cards display name, city, and action menu
assertions: Person icons are visible on cards
At least one Card is displayed
PopupMenuButton is present on each card for edit/delete actions

suites.title: FAB add button is visible on person list
Person form loads with all required and optional fields
steps: Tap FloatingActionButton to open create form
assertions: Fields Nom, Prénom, Date de naissance, Rue, Ville, Code postal, RIB are visible

suites.title: User list loads from drawer navigation with cards
steps: Tap 'Plus' in bottom nav to open drawer
assertions: At least one Card widget is displayed

suites.title: User cards display email and role badges
assertions: At least one email address (containing '@') is visible
At least one role badge (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT, or CLIENT) is visible

suites.title: User cards have action menu with deactivate option
assertions: PopupMenuButton is present on each user card

suites.title: User list supports pull-to-refresh
assertions: RefreshIndicator widget wraps the user list

suites.title: Reference screen loads with Caractéristiques and Lieux tabs
steps: Tap 'Plus' in bottom nav to open drawer

suites.title: Caractéristiques tab shows items with add field
steps: Navigate to Données de référence via drawer
assertions: Add field with hint 'Ajouter une caractéristique...' is visible

suites.title: Lieux tab shows items with add field
steps: Navigate to Données de référence via drawer
assertions: Add field with hint 'Ajouter un lieu...' is visible

suites.title: Quick action buttons visible: Nouveau bien, Nouveau contrat, Nouvelle personne
steps: Login as admin and land on dashboard

suites.title: Recent activity sections visible (Biens recents, Contrats recents)

Scroll down to recent activity sections

Property cards with BI- prefix are visible

suites.title: Property cards show popup menu with Modifier, Archiver, and Supprimer options

Tap popup menu on first property card

suites.title: Add property FAB is visible with add icon
steps: Login as admin and navigate to Biens tab

suites.title: Property create form loads with Type, Rue, Ville, Code postal fields

Tap FAB to open create form

suites.title: Property form shows optional fields: Superficie, Score eco, Description

Tap FAB, scroll down in form

suites.title: Property cards display actif/archived status badge
steps: Login as admin and navigate to Biens tab
Wait for property list to load
assertions: Property cards show 'Actif' or 'Archivé' status indicator

suites.title: Agency list loads from drawer navigation with agency cards
steps: Login as admin, open drawer via Plus tab
assertions: At least one Card widget is visible

suites.title: Agency card displays name and business icon
steps: Login as admin and navigate to Agences via drawer

suites.title: Tapping agency card opens edit form with Modifier title
steps: Login as admin, navigate to Agences

suites.title: Agency form has all expected fields including Telephone, Email, Logo
steps: Login as admin, navigate to Agences

suites.title: Contract list loads with CTR- prefixed contract cards showing typeContrat
steps: Login as admin and navigate to Contrats tab
assertions: Contract cards with CTR- prefix are visible

suites.title: Contract cards display status badge, type badge, and Bien reference
steps: Login as admin and navigate to Contrats tab
assertions: Chevron right icons visible indicating tappable cards

suites.title: Contract detail screen shows Bien info, snapshot fields, and Cosignataires
steps: Login as admin, navigate to Contrats tab
assertions: CTR- ID visible in detail screen
Snapshot fields visible (prix or mensualite depending on type)

suites.title: Contract detail shows status and typeContrat badges

Tap first contract card to open detail
assertions: Person outlined icons visible for cosigners

suites.title: Public bottom navigation has 4 tabs and tab switching works
steps: Verify 4 bottom nav tabs: Accueil, Biens, Agences, Connexion
Tap each tab and verify screen content switches
Tap Connexion tab and verify login screen appears
assertions: Bottom nav has Accueil, Biens, Agences, Connexion tabs
Tapping Biens switches to property list screen
Tapping Agences switches to agency list screen
Tapping Connexion shows login form with 'Se connecter' button
Tapping Accueil returns to home screen

suites.title: Admin login switches to admin bottom nav with drawer
steps: Verify admin bottom nav: Tableau de bord, Biens, Contrats, Plus
Verify AppBar shows 'Horoazhon' and role chip
Tap Plus to open admin drawer
Verify drawer items: Personnes, Utilisateurs, Agences, Profil, Deconnexion
Verify drawer header shows user name and role label
Tap Biens and Contrats tabs to verify screen switching
assertions: Admin nav shows Tableau de bord, Biens, Contrats, Plus
Plus tab opens drawer with Personnes, Utilisateurs, Agences, Profil, Deconnexion
Tapping Biens and Contrats switches screen content

suites.title: Client login shows public nav with client dashboard on Profil tab
steps: Verify public nav tabs: Accueil, Biens, Agences, Profil
Verify admin-only tabs (Tableau de bord, Plus) are absent
Verify Profil tab shows client dashboard ('Votre espace client')
assertions: Public nav shows Accueil, Biens, Agences, Profil
Tableau de bord and Plus tabs are not present
Profil tab shows ClientDashboardScreen with 'Votre espace client'

suites.title: Client dashboard loads with welcome message, stat cards, and data sections with new contract shape
steps: Verify welcome header 'Bonjour, {prenom}' and 'Votre espace client'
Verify stat cards: Biens, Contrats, Actifs
Scroll to 'Mes biens recents' section (shows only active properties)
Verify biens section shows data or 'Aucun bien' empty state
Verify contrats section shows contract cards with typeContrat badge or 'Aucun contrat' empty state
assertions: Stat cards for Biens, Contrats, Actifs are present
'Mes biens recents' section header is visible
Biens section shows only active property cards or 'Aucun bien'
'Mes contrats recents' section header is visible
Contract cards show typeContrat badge (Location/Achat) and Bien reference

suites.title: Client dashboard uses public nav and supports tab switching
steps: Verify public nav tabs (Accueil, Biens, Agences, Profil)
Verify admin tabs (Tableau de bord, Plus) are absent
Verify client dashboard content is no longer visible
assertions: Public nav shows Accueil, Biens, Agences, Profil
Switching to Accueil hides 'Votre espace client'
Switching back to Profil shows 'Votre espace client' again

suites.title: Profile screen shows user info, email, role badge, and initials avatar
steps: Open drawer via Plus tab and navigate to Profil
assertions: At least one Chip widget exists (role badge)

suites.title: Password change section expands/collapses with correct fields
steps: Login as admin and navigate to profile
Verify 'Changer le mot de passe' header is visible
Tap header to expand password section
Verify 3 TextField fields: Mot de passe actuel, Nouveau mot de passe, Confirmer le mot de passe
assertions: 'Changer le mot de passe' header visible
Expanded section shows 3 password TextField widgets
Labels: 'Mot de passe actuel', 'Nouveau mot de passe', 'Confirmer le mot de passe'
Icon toggles between expand_more and expand_less

suites.title: Logout button visible with confirmation dialog and successful logout
steps: Login as admin and navigate to profile
Verify confirmation dialog: 'Voulez-vous vous deconnecter ?' with Annuler
Verify return to public shell with 'Connexion' tab
assertions: Tapping shows dialog with 'Voulez-vous vous deconnecter ?'
Confirming logout returns to public shell with 'Connexion' tab
